/usr/bin/ar qc libproject-port.a "CMakeFiles/project-port.dir/mnt/c/ASUAREZ/Programacion/SDG/SDG2/MatrixMCU/drivers/stm32f4xx/CMSIS/Device/ST/STM32F4xx/Source/Templates/gcc/startup_stm32f446xx.s.obj" "CMakeFiles/project-port.dir/port/stm32f4/src/interr.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/project-port.dir/port/stm32f4/src/stm32f4_system.c.obj" "CMakeFiles/project-port.dir/port/stm32f4/src/syscalls.c.obj"
/usr/bin/ranlib libproject-port.a
